resources.string: Notifies you whenever an app in the LSPosed scope requests a Google Play Integrity verdict.
Alerts when a watched app uses the Play Integrity API.
%1$s (%2$s) just asked Google Play for a Play Integrity verdict.
Module not active — enable it in LSPosed, then add this app to its own scope to verify.

1. Enable this module in LSPosed.
2. In the module’s scope, tick every app you want to watch (and this app, to verify status).
3. Force-stop the watched apps (or reboot).
When a watched app requests a Play Integrity verdict, you’ll get a notification here.
No Play Integrity usage detected yet.
